Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Leutza stated that he filed second supplement to the report and petition for settlement of the account, and that he has given notice. The accounting petition was continued to May 13, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
